queries.question: Which room number is shared by all the teachers and what is its capacity?
queries.sql: SELECT Classrooms.room_number, Classrooms.capacity  from Teachers_Classrooms join Classrooms on Teachers_Classrooms.classroom_id = Classrooms.classroom_id join Teachers on Teachers_Classrooms.teacher_id = Teachers.teacher_id   GROUP BY Teachers_Classrooms.classroom_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Teachers_Classrooms.teacher_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Teachers)

queries.question: What are the capacities of the classrooms that are common for all teachers?
queries.sql: SELECT Classrooms.capacity  from Teachers_Classrooms join Classrooms on Teachers_Classrooms.classroom_id = Classrooms.classroom_id join Teachers on Teachers_Classrooms.teacher_id = Teachers.teacher_id   GROUP BY Teachers_Classrooms.classroom_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Teachers_Classrooms.teacher_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Teachers)

queries.question: What are the room numbers and capacities that every teacher uses?
queries.sql: select teachers.full_name , classrooms.room_number , classrooms.capacity from Teachers_Classrooms join Classrooms on Teachers_Classrooms.classroom_id = Classrooms.classroom_id join Teachers on Teachers_Classrooms.teacher_id = Teachers.teacher_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?room_number ?capacity WHERE {
  ?teachers_classrooms a :Teachers_Classrooms .
  ?classrooms a :Classrooms .
  ?teachers_classrooms p:hasClassrooms ?classrooms .
  ?teachers a :Teachers .
  ?teachers_classrooms p:hasTeachers ?teachers .
  ?teachers p:name ?full_name .
  ?classrooms p:room_number ?room_number .
  ?classrooms p:capacity ?capacity .
}

queries.question: What are the room numbers used by all the teachers?
queries.sql: SELECT Classrooms.room_number  from Teachers_Classrooms join Classrooms on Teachers_Classrooms.classroom_id = Classrooms.classroom_id join Teachers on Teachers_Classrooms.teacher_id = Teachers.teacher_id   GROUP BY Teachers_Classrooms.classroom_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Teachers_Classrooms.teacher_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Teachers)

queries.question: For every teacher, list all the room numbers booked by each.
queries.sql: select teachers.full_name , classrooms.room_number from Teachers_Classrooms join Classrooms on Teachers_Classrooms.classroom_id = Classrooms.classroom_id join Teachers on Teachers_Classrooms.teacher_id = Teachers.teacher_id
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?room_number WHERE {
  ?teachers_classrooms a :Teachers_Classrooms .
  ?classrooms a :Classrooms .
  ?teachers_classrooms p:hasClassrooms ?classrooms .
  ?teachers a :Teachers .
  ?teachers_classrooms p:hasTeachers ?teachers .
  ?teachers p:name ?full_name .
  ?classrooms p:room_number ?room_number .

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the room numbers and capacities that every teacher uses?
What are the capacities of the classrooms that every teacher uses?
What classroom numbers are used by each teacher?
